case_title: SMIRNOV, ECATERINA VS WOODSTOCK, ROBERT E., AS TRUSTEE OF WOODCOCK TRUST et al

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FROM STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANIES FILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WOODSTOCK, ROBERT E., AS TRUSTEE OF WOODCOCK TRUST

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMIRNOV, ECATERINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODSTOCK, ROBERT E., AS TRUSTEE OF WOODCOCK TRUST $2,671.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,766.00, COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE CITY AND COUNTY AND AGAINST ECATRINA SMIRNOV. COURT FINDS SPECIAL DAMAGES OF $2342 AND GENERAL DAMAGES OF $3000. COURT FURTHER FINDS CONTRIBUTORY FAULT ON THE PART OF PLAINTIFF WHICH REDUCES JUDGMENT BY 50% = $2671. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SMIRNOV, ECATERINA AS TO DEFENDANT WOODSTOCK, ROBERT E., AS TRUSTEE OF WOODCOCK TRUST WOODCOCK, ANNA M., AS TRUSTEE OF WOODCOCK TRUST. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO; DEPT. PUBLIC WKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
